---
title: "Dilema de los tres caminos"
output: html_notebook
Author: ascj
---


```{r}
# O dilema dos três caminhos

# Crear los ensayos
ensaio = seq(1,31,1)
ensaio  # Runs in console

tempo = c(18.3,18.9,10.9,20.7,11.4,22.9,12.1,12.8,13.3,
          10.9,13.1,12.7,20.6,18.9,11.0,10.3,13.0,18.6,
          13.0,10.6,10.4,21.5,10.9,10.9,11.0,19.1,16.1,
          12.1,18.1,12.2,19.2)

tempo # Runs in console

plot(ensaio, tempo,    # Todos los tiempos 
     ylab="Tiempo (min)", # Etiqueta Y
     xlab="Ensayo",         # Etiqueta x
     ylim=c(5,25))            # Limites, 5 a 25 m 

# -- route separation ---- 
# Route A
xA = seq(1,6,1) # Sol , lluvia, transitado, 1era parada
PERCURSOA = c(12.8,13.3,13.1,12.7,13.0,13.0)

# Route B
xB = seq(7,19,1) # Sombra, autopista, camino diagonal, 3era parada
PERCURSOB = c(10.9,11.4,12.1,10.9,11.0,10.3,10.6,10.4,10.9,10.9,11.0,12.1,12.2)

# Route C
xC = seq(20,31,1) # Sombra, seguro, agradable, 16 parada
PERCURSOC = c(18.3,18.9,20.7,22.9,20.6,18.9,18.6,21.5,19.1,16.1,18.1,19.2)

# --- Graphy by routes
plot(xA, PERCURSOA,
     xlab  = "Ensayo",
     ylab  = "Tiempo (min)",
     main  = "Datos del experimento estratificados",
     xlim  = c(0, 32),
     ylim  = c(5, 25),
     col   = "red")     # Camino A → rojo

# Agregamos el camino B en NEGRO (por defecto)
lines(xB, PERCURSOB, type = "p")

# Agregamos el camino C en AZUL
lines(xC, PERCURSOC, type = "p", col = "blue")

legend("topleft",
       legend=c("A","B","C"),
       text.col =c("red", "black", "blue"),
       inset=0.02,
        pch=1)      # plotting character

# --- Prueba t _ A vs B
t.test(PERCURSOA,PERCURSOB)   # Runs in console

# --- Desviacion Estandar Conjunta-Combinada
#  --- (17 grados de libertad)

VAR = ((6-1)*var(PERCURSOA) + (13-1)*var(PERCURSOB)) / ((6-1)+(13-1))
VAR      # Runs in console

desvio = sqrt(VAR)
desvio     # Runs in console

# --- as médias e os desvios para cada percurso/Route
MEDIA.A= mean(PERCURSOA)
MEDIA.A
## [1] 12.98333
SD.A= sd(PERCURSOA)
SD.A
## [1] 0.2136976
MEDIA.B = mean(PERCURSOB)
MEDIA.B
## [1] 11.13077
SD.B= sd(PERCURSOB)
SD.B
## [1] 0.6355898
MEDIA.C = mean(PERCURSOC)
MEDIA.C
## [1] 19.40833
SD.C= sd(PERCURSOC)
SD.C
## [1] 1.779917

# Construimos la tabla resumen como un data frame
resumen <- data.frame(
  Camino         = c("A", "B", "C"),
  Ensayos        = c(6, 13, 12),
  Media_min      = c(round(MEDIA.A, 2), round(MEDIA.B, 2), round(MEDIA.C, 2)),
  Desv_Estandar  = c(round(SD.A, 4),   round(SD.B, 4),   round(SD.C, 4))
)
resumen



```
